channel.title: CashlessConsumer Books — New Releases
channel.description: New book releases from CashlessConsumer's independent DPI reference library

item.title: Aadhaar eSign: The Definitive Reference
item.description: A comprehensive reference work covering India's Aadhaar eSign ecosystem

item.title: Jan Parichay: The Definitive Reference
item.description: A definitive reference on Jan Parichay (Meri Pehchaan), India's National Single Sign-On, and the Digital Life Certificate (Jeevan Pramaan) — architecture, adoption data, the state-wise survey, and consumer-protection analysis.
